description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring horizontal plank siding and a flat, stepped roofline. The front facade has a prominent covered porch with railings and a central staircase leading up to double doors, flanked by two sets of multi-pane windows on both levels. The side views reveal additional windows and the continuation of the porch along the front, while the rear is simpler, with a single upper door and a large, slatted lower section. The wood appears aged and untreated, giving the structure a historical, Old West saloon-like character. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the overall form is boxy with minimal ornamentation. The cabin is elevated slightly above ground on short supports, suggesting adaptation for uneven terrain.
description: A weathered, two-story wooden cabin with a covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a flat, stepped roof. The structure has a rustic, Old West appearance and is elevated on short supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central staircase, double doors, and symmetrical windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the wood plank siding, two sets of windows, and the depth of the porch structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single upper door, a large slatted lower section, and no porch or stairs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible windows and the porch extending from the front.
attribute_roof_type: flat stepped roof with a central raised section, constructed from wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: Symmetrical arrangement with two multi-pane windows on each floor of the front facade, and additional single windows on each side; all windows are rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_door_placement: Double doors centered on the front facade at both ground and upper levels, and a single door centered on the rear upper level.
